title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT Asia Pacific Associates:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Asia Pacific Associates!
